technical_remediation.success_metric: Technical finding resolved in next comparable crawl

seo_demand.success_metric: Improve organic CTR, clicks, or average position in next 28d GSC window

cro_activation.success_metric: Improve WAFlow submit or qualified lead rate

content_opportunity.success_metric: Publish or update content and measure 28d organic demand

serp_competitor_opportunity.success_metric: Improve SERP feature coverage, snippet CTR, or competitor gap

tracking_attribution.success_metric: Tracking chain emits expected event with source attribution

legacy_growth_inventory.success_metric: Validated Growth OS backlog item reaches Council-ready state

growth_opportunity.success_metric: Selected Growth OS metric improves in next evaluation window
